<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Event; use League\CommonMark\Node\Block\Document; /** * Event dispatched when the document has been fully parsed */ final class DocumentParsedEvent extends AbstractEvent { /** @psalm-readonly */ private Document $document; public function __construct(Document $document) { $this->document = $document; } public function getDocument(): Document { return $this->document; } }
